F1® Manager 2024.name: F1® Manager 2024 - Deluxe Upgrade Pack
F1® Manager 2024.desc: The F1® Manager 2024 Deluxe Upgrade Pack contains 5 classically inspired livery patterns for use in Create A Team and 5 custom race replay scenarios that will push even the most strategic Team Principal to the limit.

F1® Manager 2024.name: F1® Manager 2024: Historical Livery Pack
F1® Manager 2024.desc: Bring the past to the present with the Historical Livery Pack, containing 6 livery patterns inspired by classic designs for your Create A Team car.

F1® Manager 2024.name: F1® Manager 2024: Abstract Livery Pack
F1® Manager 2024.desc: Unleash the creativity of your team with the Abstract Livery Pack, containing 6 bold new livery patterns for your Create A Team car.

FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION.name: FFXV WINDOWS EDITION 4K Resolution Pack
FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION.desc: This pack allows you to enjoy FINAL FANTASY XV in high resolution.

FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION.name: FINAL FANTASY XV EPISODE ARDYN
FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION.desc: FINAL FANTASY XV illustrates the past of the mysterious man Ardyn, the greatest enemy of the protagonist Noctis. Denied by the Crystal and at the mercy of fate, the origins of Ardyn's revenge and his emotional conflicts are all revealed.

FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION.name: FINAL FANTASY XV Original Soundtrack
FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION.desc: The FINAL FANTASY XV Original Soundtrack heralds the dawn of a new age in FF music. The main composer, Yoko Shimomura, brings her signature dramatic compositions to this masterpiece. *The tracklist differs from the Blu-ray version. *This is an audio-only album and does not include video content.

FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION.name: Piano Collections - FINAL FANTASY XV: Moonlit Melodies
FINAL FANTASY XV WINDOWS EDITION.desc: The music of the FF XV soundtrack returns as an entry in the Piano Collections series. Produced by Yoko Shimomura, this album includes a selection of pieces she most wanted to hear brought to life on the keyboard. Let these cool and clear melodies take you to another musical world.
